CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-08-2024 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-22-2024 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-08-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-22-2024 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-08-2024 Continued To Sep-16-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Defendant City And County Of San Francisco'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-12-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Monetary Sanctions.

There being no appearances, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Motion to compel GRANTED. No timely opposition filed. Objections are waived. Complete responses to discovery requests, and production of all responsive documents, due to be served no later than September 29, 2023, unless otherwise agreed by the parties. The request for sanctions is DENIED for failure to prove the amount or basis of any monetary sanction.

Judge Pro Tem Borrowman to review and sign the proposed order that was submitted by Defendant City and County of San Francisco.

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-03-2023 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Monetary Sanctions.

No appearances made in this matter.

There being no appearance made by the moving party, the Court rules as follows: Defendant City and County of San Francisco's motion is denied.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
